creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text: Yea, if we can reproduce this, then I'm very keen on fixing it before the release. If we can't, I'm content to let Ed's preening of makefs proceed so that it's more likely to work next time.  I've not seen such pickiness in ISO images since I was playing around with my ArcStation I windows NT MIPS box back in the 90s which would only boot certain ISOs I could create for it, but not others... It was so random I never could get to the bottom of it...
